arts.ttl: Crystal Palace’s pre-FA Cup semi-final scheduling is unfair, says Oliver Glasner
arts.sum: Opponents Aston Villa have an extra day to prepare ‘You are shouting against the wind and nobody hears you’ Oliver Glasner has complained that the buildup to Crystal Palace’s FA Cup semi-final against Aston Villa is unfair, after the Premier League turned down a request from the London club to have both sides play on the same night in midweek. Villa were in action at Manchester City on Tuesday night while Palace travel to the Emirates Stadium 24 hours later. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arteta will not rest players against Palace despite looming PSG tie
arts.sum: ‘When players are fit and available, they have to play’ Liverpool to be league winners if Arsenal lose to Palace Mikel Arteta will not shy away from selecting key Arsenal personnel to face Crystal Palace on Wednesday in their final game before next week’s Champions League semi-final first leg even though his team are playing for little beyond pride. The meagre prize on offer is delaying Liverpool’s title celebrations but the manager denied he could wrap members of his squad in cotton wool. “We cannot think in those terms,” Arteta said. “I think when the players are fit and they are available and they want to play, they have to play. They are at their best when they are playing and they have consistency in their performances.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner: Palace playing Arsenal just before cup semi not the best choice
arts.sum: The Eagles face one of the toughest fixtures of the season on Wednesday, and less than 70 hours later play one of the biggest matches in their history

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Arsenal injuries, Saka's contract, Crystal Palace and PSG
arts.sum: Yeah, if we want to, I think he would have a good chance to play tomorrow. Especially because of where some other players are coming and the amount of minutes that they can play, but it's good to have a little gap, because we are, we are really short in numbers.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes decision on Bukayo Saka's playing time as Arsenal prepare for Champions League semi-final showdown with PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says Bukayo Saka has revealed the decision he has made over star player Bukayo Saka's workload ahead of Arsenal's Champions League semi-final against PSG next week.

arts.ttl: Glasner: "We will go there to show our style"
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has discussed the challenges of a Premier League trip to Arsenal days before an FA Cup semi-final at Wembley – but insists his team are firmly focused on the matter at hand.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta faces tricky balancing act as Arsenal boss makes Premier League vow
arts.sum: Arsenal are gearing up for a huge Champions League clash against Paris Saint-Germain knowing that their domestic campaign is winding down but Mikel Arteta does not want to rest his stars for fear of their rhythm being upset

arts.ttl: Arsenal: 'Very intelligent' Bukayo Saka knows how to laugh off jeers from rival fans, says Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: The Arsenal star was booed by Ipswich fans after being injured last weekend

arts.ttl: Osimhen transfer 'agreed' as Arsenal hijack takes place
arts.sum: A key Arsenal summer transfer has been hijacked by Aston Villa, according to Fabrizio Romano. Osimhen transfer 'agreed' as Arsenal hijack takes place

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major blow in Matheus Cunha transfer pursuit despite 'talks' beginning
arts.sum: Despite looking almost certain to qualify for next season's Champions League, it is reported by Sky that Cunha's preference is a move to Manchester United . Arsenal have reportedly opened talks to sign Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha but it is understood that the Brazilian may want to move to a rival instead.
